summary: EXP-398 patches part8b 8b.5(d) and 8b.7 to soften the 'already in force' commitment language to 'going forward', acknowledges that pre-2026-04-18 citations are pending compliance, and points to a follow-up citation-compliance audit issue (filed as proposal-ISS-CITATION-COMPLIANCE-AUDIT.json in this same batch). Two in-place <details> replacements; no new sections; no DATA blob touches. Class: deep-attack (override note in EXP). Adopts curmudgeon SEC-8b.c1 hole #3 Recommendation A.
integration_note: When integrating, replace 'a follow-up issue' (twice in 8b.7, once in 8b.5(d)) with the actual ISS number assigned to the citation-compliance audit. If the new ISS hasn't been opened yet, integrate as 'a follow-up issue' and backfill later.
